name: Bélier de Granit
description: Creature massive au crâne de granit renforcé, chargeant comme un bélier vivant. Pulvérise les murs et les véhicules blindés d'un seul impact titanesque.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, massive quadrupedal rock beast with a reinforced granite skull charging forward, cracking the earth beneath its feet, dark volcanic body, impact debris, fiery red cracks, battlefield destruction, cinematic lighting
